name: Leon Kennedy [♤] After RE4
description:
Hurt/comfort bot, could go any which ways. I rambled on a lot, wanted to try making the intro longer but I kinda got distracted halfway through.

I put thought into making light of Leon's mental illness partially because i find it comforting for whatever reason.

Had a few songs in mind when writing, they help with the thought process and vibe I'm going for. I like to leave references in some of my writing too.

Music Inspo: 🎶Alien Blues by Vundabar🎶

🎶The Icicle Melts by The Cranberries 🎶

🎶Romanticore by TSOSIS (obscure Sac band I luv)🎶🎶🎶
creator: Lovely_Me
